headlines.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze Indiana and Ohio primary results
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from the Indiana and Ohio primaries, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

headlines.title: Republicans fret over Iowa as tough midterm races develop
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance will visit Iowa Tuesday — a trip meant to help endangered Rep. Zach Nunn in a state where the GOP also faces issues in big races for the Senate and governor.

headlines.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio
headlines.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

headlines.title: Sherrod Brown wins Democratic Senate nomination in Ohio, setting up a key battleground race
headlines.description: Former Sen. Sherrod Brown has won the Democratic nomination in Ohio’s special Senate election, NBC News projects, paving the way for a nationally watched general election matchup against Republican incumbent Jon Husted

headlines.title: Vance makes Iowa debut with a midterm message: 'This is not a normal election'
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance took repeated shots at Democrats in Iowa in a midterm-year effort to boost a vulnerable Republican congressman.

headlines.title: U.S. insists Iran ceasefire not over despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The ceasefire in the Middle East was in peril Tuesday after the United States and Iran traded fire and threats over President Donald Trump's new mission to force open the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer dollars to secure Trump ballroom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump portrayed the big new ballroom he’s building on White House grounds as a gift to the nation, courtesy of patriotic private donors.

headlines.title: What unsealed court documents reveal about the Lively-Baldoni legal saga
headlines.description: Newly unsealed documents in the legal battle between “It Ends With Us” co-stars Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni pull back the curtain on a monthslong courtroom clash that riveted the entertainment industry

headlines.title: NFL star Stefon Diggs found not guilty of assaulting his live-in chef
headlines.description: A Massachusetts jury on Tuesday acquitted former New England Patriots wide receiver Stefon Diggs of charges that he assaulted a live-in chef

headlines.title: Passenger Stuck on Cruise With Hantavirus Outbreak Speaks Out
headlines.description: Nearly 150 passengers, including 17 Americans, are trapped on a cruise ship off the coast of West Africa after seven possible cases of hantavirus have now been identified aboard, according to the World Health Organization. The suspected outbreak has killed at least three people and two other patients onboard the ship are being prepared for evacuation. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Video shows driver allegedly hitting group of cyclists
headlines.description: Video shows driver allegedly hitting group of cyclists

headlines.title: Questions remain unanswered after Baldoni-Lively settlement
headlines.description: NBC News' Rebecca Keegan joins "Here's the Scoop" to talk about how Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni's case raises questions of just how much public perception could be manipulated, which Lively's team has alleged that Baldoni has done to target her reputation.
